'''True Invids''' were the members of the [[Invids]] who directly crewed the ''[[Invidious]]''. Their starfighter squadrons included [[Blade Squadron (True Invids)|Blade Squadron]], [[Saber Squadron (Invid)|Saber Squadron]], and [[Pike Squadron]].

{{Stub}}
